title: Part 7 – Passage unique : avis de changement de direction
instructions: Lisez la note de service, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
To: All Employees
From: Board of Directors
Subject: Leadership Announcement

We are pleased to announce that Ms. Sandra Obi has been appointed as the new Chief Operating Officer of Greenleaf Industries, effective December 1st.

Ms. Obi brings over eighteen years of experience in operations management, most recently as Vice President of Operations at Trident Manufacturing, where she oversaw a team of over four hundred employees and led a major cost-reduction initiative that saved the company 8 million dollars annually.

Mr. Thomas Hale, our current COO, will be transitioning to an advisory role and will remain with the company through March to ensure a smooth handover.

We are confident that Ms. Obi's expertise and vision will be invaluable as we continue to grow. Please join us in welcoming her to the Greenleaf family.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of this memo?
choices: To inform staff of a restructuring
To explain a change in company strategy
questions.explanation: "Ms. Sandra Obi has been appointed as the new Chief Operating Officer".

questions.prompt: When will Ms. Obi start her new role?
What role will Mr. Hale take on?
choices: He will move to a different company
He will transition to an advisory role
questions.explanation: "Mr. Thomas Hale will be transitioning to an advisory role".

questions.prompt: Until when will Mr. Hale stay with the company?
questions.explanation: "will remain with the company through March to ensure a smooth handover".
